name: Interactive Brokers (TWS / IB Gateway)
description: Broker execution plugin for Interactive Brokers via the ib_async SDK. Requires Trader Workstation (TWS) or IB Gateway running locally — paper port 7497 (TWS) or 4002 (Gateway). Paper-mode default; BYOK via the OS keychain. Order placement gated by the v0.5.0 safety layer (BLUEPRINT §6.5).
author: Vysted Team
